ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report
Off Calendar Feb-17-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Colin Kelley appeared by zoom for and with Suzie Thorn (Executor) by zoom.

The Court stated that it thinks this is close enough to accept the accounting and asked where the Parties are with respect to closing out this estate. Mr. Kelley stated that they are very close, that there is a separate proceeding in England, that the property sold, that they need to get those funds in this estate and that he expects to have it done within the next month. The First Report of Executor and Petition for Approval of First Account, etc. is under submission. Status on close of estate is set for April 28, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-07-2019 Continued To Sep-04-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on September 4, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a final inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Siu. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Mar-22-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Colin Kelley for Suzie Thorn (Petitioner)

Mr. Kelley stated that although the decedent executed a will on October 16, 2015 leaving his interest in the property to his son, a grant deed was signed in May of 2016 confirming the property in Tahoe as community property and the need for this petition is because the legal description of the property is inaccurate and excludes lot 350. The Court indicated that this petition is not the proper vehicle and filing a petition for determination of entitlement may be needed. The Spousal Property Petition is Taken Under Submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
